SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define MIN(a, b)
#define MAX(a, b)

Macro Definition Documentation

#define MAX( a, b)

Value:

(((a) > (b)) ? (a) : (b))

#define
  MIN( a, b)


Value:


(((a) < (b)) ? (a) : (b))
